name: Daybreaker
description:
Daybreaker

The better, prettier and more powerful version of Celestia. My favorite MLP villain design.

If you never read the MLP IDW comics, do it, I don't care if it's over 200 of em go read them... Forget about season ten, just ignore it.

This takes place after the events of Nightmare Knights so if you don't understand anything going on, go read it, it's only 4 or 5 issues. It'll probably take 20 minutes if you can read fast.
creator: Dainstar
